default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflows, and next steps for SEO optimization and lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented a comprehensive content strategy using Airtable for workflow management and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Tribe AI to provide access to CMS and Google Search Console for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Focus on creating content clusters, optimizing existing content, and implementing lead generation tactics](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Kendra (Tribe AI) to collaborate with GrowthX on aligning internal content creation with SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [GrowthX presented Airtable-based content strategy and workflow](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Strategy includes keyword research, competitor analysis, and content clustering](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [10-12 articles per week planned, with catch-up for previous delays](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Airtable to be used for assigning tasks, tracking progress, and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### SEO Optimization Tactics

  - [Focus on creating content clusters for building authority and improving SEO](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Implement land and expand, keyword stacking, and competitor research strategies](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Optimize existing content with refreshes (5 per week suggested)](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Update content dates and titles for quick SEO boosts](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### Lead Generation Improvements

  - [Suggestions for optimizing blog layout for lead capture:](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
    1.  Utilize blank space for lead magnets or widgets
    2.  Implement pop-ups or inline forms for email capture
    3.  Install JavaScript to identify visitor job titles for targeted follow-ups
  - [Create downloadable assets (e.g., case studies, tools) for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Reporting and Performance Tracking

  - [GrowthX to provide monthly reports with Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Track impressions, clicks, and performance improvements for new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Conduct A/B testing on refreshed content to measure impact](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### CMS and Content Publishing

  - [GrowthX to review current CMS setup and suggest optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/_1wewLHs-FsMpHpkWuvdyyzdr_GSoxNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
